title: Build session orchestrator (start/stop coordination)
description: When Android app creates a session (badge photo taken), orchestrator: (1) creates session folder in S3 with metadata.json, (2) claims a V1 tenant from pool, writes tenant.json, (3) writes start command for the correct demo PC to poll, (4) on end signal: writes stop command. Demo PCs poll S3 every 1s for start, every 5s for end. Each demo PC has a unique ID and only reads its own commands.
tests: Create session -> S3 folder created with metadata.json + tenant.json within 5s
Demo PC polls -> detects session start within 2s
End session -> demo PC detects within 5s, stops recording
Two sessions on different PCs simultaneously -> no cross-talk
Session created but no demo PC available -> queued, not lost
notes: Lambda orchestrator in infra/session-orchestrator/ with full state machine, deploy.sh, and tests
